ddls:
CREATE TABLE "road_types" (
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road type */,
  "road_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the road type (e.g., Motorway, Trunk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road type */,
  "max_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit for the road type */,
  "typically_used_by" TEXT /* Common types of vehicles that use the road type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road type */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles (in thousands) on the road */,
  "traffic_volume_10km" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles (in thousands) per 10km of the road */,
  "accidents" INTEGER /* Number of accidents on the road */,
  "accidents_10km" INTEGER /* Number of accidents per 10km of the road */,
  "junctions" INTEGER /* Number of junctions on the road */,
  "road_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the road (in km) */,
  "road_length_10km" INTEGER /* Total length of the road (in 10km segments) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic data collection */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic data collection */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_road_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_type_id") REFERENCES road_types ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_details" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic data entry */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "accident_time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the accident (e.g., driver error, road conditions) */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Numeric severity level (e.g., 1 for minor, 5 for major) */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the accident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries reported */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_details_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road segment */,
  "road_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road type */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the road segment */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Start point of the road segment */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* End point of the road segment */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the road segment in kilometers */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit for the segment */,
  "number_of_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes on the segment */,
  "construction_status" TEXT /* Current construction status (e.g., no construction, ongoing, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_segments_road_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_type_id") REFERENCES road_types ("road_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "junctions" (
  "junction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each junction */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment */,
  "junction_name" TEXT /* Name of the junction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the junction */,
  "traffic_signal" TEXT /* Presence of traffic signals (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "number_of_approaches" INTEGER /* Number of approaches to the junction */,
  "average_delay" REAL /* Average delay time at the junction (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("junction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_junctions_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic flow entry */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic flow data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic flow data */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles counted */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles (in km/h) */,
  "peak_hour" TEXT /* Peak hour of the day (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flow_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition entry */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the road condition data */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of road condition (e.g., potholes, construction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road condition */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Numeric severity level of the condition */,
  "impact_on_traffic" TEXT /* Impact on traffic flow (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., repair, resurfacing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was completed */,
  "maintained_by" TEXT /* Entity or team that performed the maintenance */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the traffic data entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high traffic, high accidents) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time of the alert */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the road project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the project details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
